creator: churanov.port.maintainer@gmail.com
text:
The patch at http://alexanderchuranov.com/boost-port/boost-1.41-sparc64/patch-boost_smart_ptr_detail_sp_counted_base_gcc_sparc.hpp should be added to devel/boost-libs/files. This allows libraries to build on SPARC64 platform.

It was verified that all tests are passed.
The Boost team has reviewed the patch and confirmed that the approach for building and running tests was correct.
